# Contributing to PixiePost

## Commit Message Convention
- AI commits via Codex: prefix with [Codex]
- AI commits via Claude Code: prefix with [Claude]
- Manual commits by Joe: no prefix required

## Branch Strategy
- main: production-ready code only
- dev: active development branch
- feature/xxx: individual features

## Code Style
- TypeScript strict mode
- Follow existing Postiz conventions
- Add JSDoc comments to all new functions
- Never modify upstream Postiz core files directly
- All custom PixiePost features go in /apps/pixiepost/ folder
